= Contents =
    - [[#Tests|Tests]]
        - [[#Tests#mocking|mocking]]
    - [[#Workspace|Workspace]]
        - [[#Workspace#create venv|create venv]]
        - [[#Workspace#create pyenv|create pyenv]]
        - [[#Workspace#activate pyenv|activate pyenv]]
        - [[#Workspace#install version of Python|install version of Python]]
        - [[#Workspace#install requirements|install requirements]]
    - [[#Tips & tricks|Tips & tricks]]
        - [[#Tips & tricks#web server|web server]]
        - [[#Tips & tricks#decode base64|decode base64]]

= Tests =
== mocking ==
To patch *class* attribute or method::
{{{class="brush: python"
  @mock.patch.object(Class, 'attribute/method')
  def test(self, mocked_attribute/method):
    mocked_method.side_effect=...
    mocked_method.return_value=...
}}}
:: also, mocked object/method can be specified
{{{class="brush: python"
  def fake_method(self):
    ...
    
  @mock.patch.object(Class, 'attribute/method', faked_method)
  def test(self):
    mocked_method.side_effect=...
    mocked_method.return_value=...
}}}

= Workspace =
== create venv ==
`python -m venv $venv`
== create pyenv ==
`pyenv virtualenv $python_version $venv_name`
== activate pyenv ==
`pyenv activate $venv_name`
== install version of Python ==
`pyenv install $version`
== install requirements ==
`pip install -r requirements.txt`
                
= Tips & tricks =
== web server ==
`python -m http.server --cgi 8000`
== decode base64 ==
{{{
    import base64
    coded_string = '''Q5YACgA...'''
    base64.b64decode(coded_string)
}}}
